data.description:

The latest update is out from Fae Technology S.P.A ( (IT:FAE) ).

FAE Technology S.p.A. – Società Benefit reported an insider transaction involving a member of its Board of Directors, indicating active participation of management in the company’s equity. The disclosure reflects the company’s adherence to transparency requirements for transactions carried out by persons in administration, control, or management roles.

Board member Angelo Facchinetti purchased 5,000 FAE Technology shares at a price of €3.58 each, as disclosed in a regulatory filing. The transaction underscores management’s direct financial exposure to the company’s performance, which may be interpreted by investors as a signal of confidence in FAE Technology’s prospects and governance stability.

More about Fae Technology S.P.A

FAE Technology S.p.A. – Società Benefit, listed with ISIN IT0005500688, operates in the financial markets through its listed shares. The company has a structured governance framework that includes a Board of Directors overseeing its strategic and operational direction.

data.title: Globeride to Grant Restricted Treasury Shares to Directors and Executives
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

The latest announcement is out from GLOBERIDE, Inc. ( (JP:7990) ).

Globeride has approved the disposal of 10,419 treasury shares as restricted share remuneration for five directors and three delegated executive officers, with a total value of about ¥25.7 million at a disposal price of ¥2,469 per share. The allotment, which represents just 0.05% of issued shares, is made in exchange for monetary remuneration receivables and is structured so that transfer restrictions remain in place until the recipients retire or resign, aligning their incentives with sustained corporate value growth.

The move is part of a restricted share remuneration system introduced in 2022 to tie management compensation more closely to shareholder interests and long-term performance, with annual limits of 25,000 shares and ¥25 million for such grants. By extending the scheme to delegated executive officers and maintaining strict conditions for lifting transfer restrictions, Globeride aims to reinforce governance, strengthen management commitment to long-term strategy, and signal disciplined use of its equity base despite a parallel plan to cancel a large block of treasury shares.

More about GLOBERIDE, Inc.

Globeride, Inc. is a Japanese manufacturer in the sporting goods industry, best known for its DAIWA-branded fishing tackle and related equipment, and it focuses on consumer leisure and sports markets worldwide. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 7990 and continues to refine governance and incentive structures to support long-term value creation.

Average Trading Volume: 106,732

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen54.09B

Learn more about 7990 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Star Asia REIT Posts Mixed June Hotel Metrics but Stays Ahead of Budget
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An announcement from Star Asia Investment Corp. ( (JP:3468) ) is now available.

Star Asia Investment Corp. reported June 2026 operating results for its hotels with variable rent, showing mixed regional performance amid a 6.8% year-on-year decline in international visitors to Japan but record June arrivals from 15 source markets. While areas like Osaka were affected by the fading impact of Expo 2025, cities such as Sendai, Nagoya and Fukuoka maintained solid or diversified demand from events, domestic travel, business and inbound segments.

Across the portfolio, both average daily rate and revenue per available room fell short of June budget but remained above budget on a cumulative basis for the fiscal period ending July 2026, underscoring resilient overall earnings despite monthly softness. The REIT also highlighted revenue-enhancement initiatives with Polaris, noting that KOKO HOTEL Ginza 1-chome improved double-occupancy and length-of-stay by upgrading bed configurations and expects higher room rates after similar upgrades on premium floors, signaling a continued focus on yield management and asset-level optimization for investors.

More about Star Asia Investment Corp.

Star Asia Investment Corporation is a Japanese real estate investment trust focused on hotel assets that generate variable rent, managed by Star Asia Investment Management Co., Ltd. Its portfolio spans key urban and regional markets such as Osaka, Fukuoka, Sapporo and Tokyo, targeting both domestic and inbound tourism demand through branded properties including KOKO HOTEL and other business and leisure hotels.

Average Trading Volume: 6,803

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen151.5B

See more data about 3468 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ClearView sets special dividend as Zurich takeover advances with major shareholder backing
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An announcement from Clearview Wealth Limited ( (AU:CVW) ) is now available.

ClearView Wealth has confirmed it will pay a fully franked special dividend of $0.05 per share, conditional on the effectiveness of Zurich Financial Services Australia’s proposed scheme-of-arrangement acquisition of the company. If implemented, the scheme consideration will be reduced to $0.60 per share, but eligible investors may benefit from associated franking credits that lift their overall value per share.

The board continues to unanimously recommend that shareholders vote in favour of the Zurich transaction at the 27 July 2026 scheme meeting, absent any superior offer and subject to the independent expert maintaining its support. ClearView’s largest shareholder group, Crescent Capital Partners, which controls 53% of the register, has reiterated its intention to back the deal under the same conditions, signalling strong support for the takeover and its terms.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CVW) stock is a Buy
with a A$0.73 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Clearview Wealth Limited stock,
see the AU:CVW Stock Forecast page.

More about Clearview Wealth Limited

ClearView Wealth Limited is an Australian financial services company listed on the ASX that provides wealth management and life insurance products. The group targets retail and advised customers, and its operations position it within the broader insurance and investment markets, where scale and ownership structures are key competitive factors.

Average Trading Volume: 883,214

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

The latest update is out from Burley Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:BUR) ).

Burley Minerals Ltd has reported the results of its 24 July 2026 general meeting, where shareholders voted on a series of capital-related and remuneration resolutions. The company disclosed detailed proxy and poll outcomes in line with Australian corporate and listing requirements, underscoring strong shareholder engagement.

All seven resolutions were carried, including ratification of a prior securities issue and approvals for directors, including the non-executive chairman, managing director and CEO, and a non-executive director, to participate in a placement. Shareholders also backed the issue of options to the lead manager and key directors, reinforcing management alignment with investors and supporting Burley’s capital-raising efforts.

data.title: Bekaert Advances €75 Million Buyback and Adjusts Treasury Share Position
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Bekaert SA ( (GB:0OQJ) ) has issued an update.

Bekaert SA continued executing the latest €75 million tranche of its share buyback program, repurchasing 50,000 shares between 16 and 22 July 2026 at an average price of €41.15 for a total of about €2.06 million, with the intention to cancel all repurchased shares and thereby reduce its share capital. The company also reported activity under its renewed liquidity agreement with Kepler Cheuvreux, which resulted in a small net sale of shares and left Bekaert holding 1,829,100 treasury shares, or 3.65% of its outstanding stock, a move that provides additional flexibility in managing its capital structure and market liquidity for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0OQJ) stock is a Hold

More about Bekaert SA

Bekaert SA is a global materials and technology group best known for its steel wire transformation and coating technologies, serving industrial, construction, automotive and other sectors. The company focuses on advanced steel wire products and related services, positioning itself as a key supplier to infrastructure, mobility and industrial customers worldwide.

data.title: Volex shifts from AIM to London Stock Exchange Main Market
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Volex plc ( (GB:VLX) ) has provided an announcement.

Volex plc, a specialist in critical power and data transmission products, has moved its listing from AIM to the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange, with its ordinary shares now admitted to the FCA’s Official List. The company’s share capital comprises 184,377,640 ordinary shares, all carrying voting rights, and its ticker and ISIN remain unchanged, providing continuity for existing investors.

Management framed the move as a milestone that better reflects Volex’s increased scale and ambition following years of transformation and growth. By shifting to the Main Market, Volex aims to enhance its visibility and broaden its appeal to a wider base of UK and international investors, a step that could support future strategic execution and deepen its capital markets profile.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:VLX) stock is a Buy
with a £600.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Volex plc stock,
see the GB:VLX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VLX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VLX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals (growth and profitability improvements with a strengthening balance sheet), partially offset by weaker cash-flow conversion. Technicals are a notable headwind due to a downtrend versus key moving averages, though oversold indicators reduce the severity. Valuation is reasonable but not cheap, and the latest earnings call adds support via strong guidance and operational momentum despite concentration and working-capital risks.

To see Spark’s full report on VLX stock,
click here.

More about Volex plc

Volex plc is a UK-headquartered integrated manufacturer specialising in power and data connectivity solutions for mission-critical applications. Serving international blue-chip customers, it operates 23 manufacturing facilities and supports OEMs and EMS companies across EV and electrification, consumer electricals, medical, complex industrial technology and off-highway markets worldwide.

data.title: Aroa Biosurgery Sets Fully Virtual 2026 AGM with Governance and CEO Incentive Votes
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Aroa Biosurgery Ltd ( (AU:ARX) ) has provided an announcement.

Aroa Biosurgery Limited has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for 19 August 2026, to be held entirely as a virtual event accessible to shareholders and proxies online. The company has distributed the notice of meeting and proxy forms and is encouraging early proxy submissions, outlining how investors can register, attend, vote and ask questions remotely.

The AGM agenda includes addresses from the board chair and CEO, consideration of financial statements for the year ended 31 March 2026, and several ordinary resolutions on governance and remuneration. Shareholders will vote on the re-election and election of directors, authorising auditor remuneration, and approving the grant of deferred short-term incentives and long-term incentives to CEO and managing director Brian Ward under the company’s omnibus incentive plan, underscoring continued focus on leadership stability and performance-based compensation.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ARX) stock is a Buy
with a A$1.09 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aroa Biosurgery Ltd stock,
see the AU:ARX Stock Forecast page.

More about Aroa Biosurgery Ltd

Aroa Biosurgery Limited is a New Zealand–headquartered soft-tissue regeneration company that develops, manufactures and distributes medical and surgical products for complex wound healing and soft tissue reconstruction. Its products are based on the proprietary AROA ECM extracellular matrix bioscaffold technology derived from ovine forestomach, with more than 7 million devices used globally and a key market focus on the United States via a direct sales force and partner Teladoc Bio, Inc.

data.title: Nippon Seisen Doubles Profit in First Quarter, Plans Higher Dividend
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Nippon Seisen Co., Ltd. ( (JP:5659) ) has issued an announcement.

Nippon Seisen reported a solid start to the fiscal year, with net sales for the three months ended June 30, 2026 rising 7.4% year on year to ¥12.1 billion and operating profit surging 72.9% to ¥804 million. Ordinary profit climbed 81.7% to ¥878 million and profit attributable to owners of parent more than doubled to ¥635 million, lifting basic earnings per share to ¥20.69, while comprehensive income grew 143.5%.

Despite higher total assets and a slight decline in the equity ratio to 72.8%, the company maintained a robust financial position and kept its full-year forecasts unchanged, targeting 6.6% sales growth and a 30.4% increase in profit attributable to owners of parent. The board also plans to raise annual dividends from ¥42 to ¥46 per share in the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027, signaling confidence in earnings momentum and delivering a higher payout to shareholders.

More about Nippon Seisen Co., Ltd.

Nippon Seisen Co., Ltd. is a Tokyo Stock Exchange-listed manufacturer operating under Japanese GAAP, focusing on industrial materials such as specialty steel wire and related products. The company serves both domestic and overseas customers, leveraging its manufacturing base to support sectors that demand high-performance metal materials and precision components.

Average Trading Volume: 69,261

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen45.37B

Learn more about 5659 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: X2M Connect Plans Major Share and Option Issue Under Securities Purchase Plan
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An announcement from X2M Connect Limited ( (AU:X2M) ) is now available.

X2M Connect Limited has announced a proposed issue of up to 312,500,000 new ordinary fully paid shares and 250,000,000 options expiring on 2 June 2029 under a securities purchase plan. The offer, recorded on 23 July 2026 and scheduled to close on 31 August 2026 with an issue date of 7 September 2026, is intended to raise capital while applying for quotation of the new securities on the ASX, potentially strengthening the company’s balance sheet and market presence.

The securities purchase plan provides existing shareholders an avenue to increase their investment in X2M Connect, with the substantial volume of shares and options signalling an ambition to fund future growth or strategic initiatives. By aligning with ASX listing rules and seeking quotation for all securities issued under the plan, the company aims to enhance liquidity in its stock and broaden its investor base, which may support its long-term positioning in the smart infrastructure market.

More about X2M Connect Limited

X2M Connect Limited is an Australia-listed technology company trading under the ASX code X2M. The company operates in the connected infrastructure and utilities sector, providing solutions enabled through smart metering and communications to improve monitoring and management of distributed assets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.26M
